description: The Aryan Brotherhood is a neo-Nazi prison gang and organized crime syndicate based in the United States, founded in 1964 at San Quentin State Prison. It engages in drug trafficking, extortion, murder-for-hire, and other criminal activities. With an estimated 15,000–20,000 members, it is considered the oldest major white supremacist prison gang in the U.S. The gang operates both inside and outside prisons, with a hierarchical structure led by a three-man commission.
